input-field.name: eligibleProductTypes
input-field.label: Eligible Product Types
Kvalificerede produkttyper
input-field.helpText: Comma-separated list of "Product Type" property group option names that should be included in AI analysis. Example: Illux Artwork,Photo Print,Canvas Art
Kommasepareret liste over "Product Type" egenskabsgruppeindstillingsnavne, der skal inkluderes i AI-analyse. Eksempel: Illux Artwork,Photo Print,Canvas Art

input-field.name: includeSeoAnalysis
input-field.label: Analyze SEO Metadata
Analysér SEO-metadata
input-field.helpText: Toggle to include SEO metadata in the output of the analysis
Slå til for at inkludere SEO-metadata i analyseresultatet

input-field.name: metaTitleMaxLength
input-field.label: Meta Title Max Length
Meta-titel maksimallængde
input-field.helpText: Maximum character count for SEO meta title (max 56). Primary keyword should appear at the front for SEO.
Maksimalt antal tegn for SEO meta-titel (maks 56). Primært nøgleord bør placeres forrest for SEO.

input-field.name: metaDescriptionMaxLength
input-field.label: Meta Description Max Length
Meta-beskrivelse maksimallængde
input-field.helpText: Maximum character count for SEO meta description (max 160 for optimal search result display).
Maksimalt antal tegn for SEO meta-beskrivelse (maks 160 for optimal visning i søgeresultater).

input-field.name: keywordCount
input-field.label: Number of SEO Keywords
Antal SEO-nøgleord
input-field.helpText: Number of keywords to generate per product (3-5)
Antal nøgleord der genereres pr. produkt (3-5)

input-field.name: keywordsMaxCharacterLength
input-field.label: Keywords Total Max Characters
Nøgleord samlet maks. tegn
input-field.helpText: Maximum total character count for all keywords combined (max 255).
Maksimalt samlet antal tegn for alle nøgleord tilsammen (maks 255).

input-field.name: includeProductDescription
input-field.label: Analyze Product Description
Analysér produktbeskrivelse
input-field.helpText: Toggle to include product store-page description in the output of the automated analysis
Slå til for at inkludere produktbeskrivelse i den automatiske analyse

input-field.name: descriptionMaxLength
input-field.label: Store Description Max Length
Butiksbeskrivelse maksimallængde
input-field.helpText: Maximum character count for customer-facing description
Maksimalt antal tegn for kundevendt beskrivelse

input-field.name: tone
input-field.label: Content Tone
Indholdstone
input-field.helpText: Sets the tone of the written descriptions
Indstiller tonen for de skrevne beskrivelser

input-field.name: analysisLanguages
input-field.label: Analysis Languages
Analyse Sprog
input-field.helpText: Comma-separated list of language codes. Example: da-DK,en-GB,nn-NO,sv-SE,de-DE
Kommasepareret liste af sprogkoder. Eksempel: da-DK,en-GB,nn-NO,sv-SE,de-DE

input-field.name: scheduledTaskInterval
input-field.label: Analysis Interval (hours)
Analyseinterval (timer)
input-field.helpText: Scheduled analysis frequency / interval for un-analyzed products
Planlagt analysefrekvens/interval for ikke-analyserede produkter

input-field.name: apiKey
input-field.label: Gemini API Key
Gemini API-nøgle
input-field.helpText: Your Google AI Studio API key for Gemini
Din Google AI Studio API-nøgle til Gemini

input-field.name: apiModel
input-field.label: Analysis Model
Analysemodel
input-field.helpText: Gemini model for image analysis (e.g., gemini-2.5-flash)
Gemini-model til billedanalyse (f.eks. gemini-2.5-flash)

input-field.name: imageGenerationModel
input-field.label: Image Generation Model
Billedgenereringsmodel
input-field.helpText: Gemini model for image generation (e.g., gemini-2.5-flash-image)
Gemini-model til billedgenerering (f.eks. gemini-2.5-flash-image)

input-field.name: apiBaseUrl
input-field.label: API Base URL
API Base URL
input-field.helpText: Base URL for the Gemini API (without version)
Base URL for Gemini API (uden version)

input-field.name: apiVersion
input-field.label: API Version
API Version
input-field.helpText: API version (e.g., v1beta, v1) - found in the full API request URL
API version (f.eks. v1beta, v1) - findes i den fulde API anmodnings URL

input-field.name: enableApprovalWorkflow
input-field.label: Require Analysis Approval
Kræv godkendelse af analyse
input-field.helpText: Require manual approval before applying analysis results, disable to automatically apply results
Kræv manuel godkendelse før analyseresultater anvendes, deaktiver for automatisk at anvende resultater

input-field.name: enableConfidenceThreshold
input-field.label: Enable Confidence-Based Review
Aktivér tillidsbaseret gennemgang
input-field.helpText: When approval workflow is disabled, flag low-confidence analyses for manual review instead of auto-applying
Når godkendelses-workflow er deaktiveret, markér analyser med lav tillid til manuel gennemgang i stedet for automatisk at anvende

input-field.name: lowConfidenceThreshold
input-field.label: Low Confidence Threshold
Lav tillidsgrænse
input-field.helpText: Results below this threshold (0.0-1.0) will be flagged for manual review. Default: 0.8 (80%)
Resultater under denne tærskel (0.0-1.0) vil blive markeret til manuel gennemgang. Standard: 0.8 (80%)

input-field.name: fieldWeightMetaTitle
input-field.label: Meta Title Weight
Meta-titel vægt
input-field.helpText: Weight for meta title in confidence calculation (0.0-1.0). All weights should sum to ~1.0
Vægt for meta-titel i tillidsberegning (0.0-1.0). Alle vægte bør summere til ~1.0

input-field.name: fieldWeightMetaDescription
input-field.label: Meta Description Weight
Meta-beskrivelse vægt
input-field.helpText: Weight for meta description in confidence calculation (0.0-1.0)
Vægt for meta-beskrivelse i tillidsberegning (0.0-1.0)

input-field.name: fieldWeightProductDescription
input-field.label: Product Description Weight
Produktbeskrivelse vægt
input-field.helpText: Weight for product description in confidence calculation (0.0-1.0)
Vægt for produktbeskrivelse i tillidsberegning (0.0-1.0)

input-field.name: fieldWeightSeoKeywords
input-field.label: SEO Keywords Weight
SEO-nøgleord vægt
input-field.helpText: Weight for SEO keywords in confidence calculation (0.0-1.0)
Vægt for SEO-nøgleord i tillidsberegning (0.0-1.0)

input-field.name: fieldWeightProperties
input-field.label: Properties Weight
Egenskaber vægt
input-field.helpText: Weight for product properties in confidence calculation (0.0-1.0)
Vægt for produktegenskaber i tillidsberegning (0.0-1.0)

input-field.name: genericPatterns
input-field.label: Generic Content Patterns (Regex)
Generiske indholdsmønstre (Regex)
input-field.helpText: Regex patterns (one per line) to detect generic/placeholder content. Danish patterns since da-DK is analyzed.
Regex-mønstre (ét pr. linje) til at opdage generisk/pladsholder-indhold. Danske mønstre da da-DK analyseres.

input-field.name: hedgingWords
input-field.label: Hedging Words
Tøvende ord
input-field.defaultValue: muligvis måske kunne være ser ud til at synes at sandsynligvis formentlig tilsyneladende
input-field.helpText: Words (one per line) indicating AI uncertainty. Danish words since da-DK is analyzed.
Ord (ét pr. linje) der indikerer AI-usikkerhed. Danske ord da da-DK analyseres.

input-field.name: idealOptionsPerProperty
input-field.label: Ideal Options Per Property
Ideelle valgmuligheder pr. egenskab
input-field.helpText: Optimal number of options per property (1-3 recommended). More options suggest AI uncertainty.
Optimalt antal valgmuligheder pr. egenskab (1-3 anbefales). Flere valgmuligheder indikerer AI-usikkerhed.

input-field.name: emptyPropertyPenalty
input-field.label: Empty Property Penalty
Straf for tom egenskab
input-field.helpText: Confidence penalty for properties with no options detected
Tillidsstraf for egenskaber uden opdagede valgmuligheder

input-field.name: excessOptionPenalty
input-field.label: Excess Option Penalty
Straf for overskydende valgmulighed
input-field.helpText: Penalty per option beyond the ideal count
Straf pr. valgmulighed ud over det ideelle antal

input-field.name: noPropertiesPenalty
input-field.label: No Properties Penalty
Straf for ingen egenskaber
input-field.helpText: Penalty when no properties are detected at all
Straf når ingen egenskaber overhovedet opdages

input-field.name: lowPropertyMatchPenalty
input-field.label: Low Property Match Penalty
Straf for lavt egenskabsmatch
input-field.helpText: Penalty when property match rate is below 50%
Straf når egenskabsmatch-rate er under 50%

input-field.name: minLengthRatio
input-field.label: Minimum Length Ratio
Minimum længdeforhold
input-field.helpText: Content below this ratio of max length is considered "too short" (0.0-1.0). Default: 0.33 (33%)
Indhold under dette forhold af maks. længde betragtes som "for kort" (0.0-1.0). Standard: 0.33 (33%)

input-field.name: shortTitlePenalty
input-field.label: Short Title Penalty
Straf for kort titel
input-field.helpText: Penalty for meta title below minimum length
Straf for meta-titel under minimumlængde

input-field.name: longTitlePenalty
input-field.label: Long Title Penalty
Straf for lang titel
input-field.helpText: Penalty for meta title exceeding max length
Straf for meta-titel der overstiger maks. længde

input-field.name: shortDescriptionPenalty
input-field.label: Short Description Penalty
Straf for kort beskrivelse
input-field.helpText: Penalty for descriptions below minimum length
Straf for beskrivelser under minimumlængde

input-field.name: fewKeywordsPenalty
input-field.label: Few Keywords Penalty
Straf for få nøgleord
input-field.helpText: Penalty when keyword count is below 60% of target
Straf når antal nøgleord er under 60% af målet

input-field.name: genericContentPenalty
input-field.label: Generic Content Penalty
Straf for generisk indhold
input-field.helpText: Penalty when generic/placeholder content is detected
Straf når generisk/pladsholder-indhold opdages

input-field.name: hedgingPenaltyPerInstance
input-field.label: Hedging Penalty (Per Instance)
Tøvende straf (pr. forekomst)
input-field.helpText: Penalty per hedging word instance detected
Straf pr. opdaget tøvende ord

input-field.name: hedgingPenaltyMax
input-field.label: Hedging Penalty (Maximum)
Tøvende straf (maksimum)
input-field.helpText: Maximum total penalty for hedging words
Maksimal samlet straf for tøvende ord

input-field.name: duplicateContentPenalty
input-field.label: Duplicate Content Penalty
Straf for dubleret indhold
input-field.helpText: Penalty when identical content is detected across languages
Straf når identisk indhold opdages på tværs af sprog

input-field.name: maxTotalPenalty
input-field.label: Maximum Total Penalty
Maksimal samlet straf
input-field.helpText: Cap on total validation penalties (0.0-1.0). Default: 0.40 (40%)
Loft på samlede valideringsstraffe (0.0-1.0). Standard: 0.40 (40%)

input-field.name: minutesSavedPerProperty
input-field.label: Minutes Saved: Properties
Minutter sparet: Egenskaber
input-field.helpText: Time saved when AI analyzes and assigns product properties
Tid sparet når AI analyserer og tildeler produktegenskaber

input-field.name: minutesSavedPerSeo
input-field.label: Minutes Saved: SEO Metadata
Minutter sparet: SEO-metadata
input-field.helpText: Time saved when AI generates meta title, description, and keywords
Tid sparet når AI genererer meta-titel, beskrivelse og nøgleord

input-field.name: minutesSavedForBaseDescription
input-field.label: Minutes Saved: Base Description
Minutter sparet: Grundbeskrivelse
input-field.helpText: Time saved for the first/primary language description
Tid sparet for den første/primære sprogbeskrivelse

input-field.name: minutesSavedPerAdditionalTranslation
input-field.label: Minutes Saved: Per Additional Translation
Minutter sparet: Pr. ekstra oversættelse
input-field.helpText: Time saved for each additional language translation beyond the first
Tid sparet for hver ekstra sprogoversættelse udover den første
